news.title: Newcastle disease reappears in Germany for first time since 1966 - foodagribusiness.world
news.summary:
# Summary

This isn't a restaurant/food news article in the traditional sense—it's actually about Newcastle disease, an avian illness that has resurfaced in Germany for the first time in nearly 60 years. While not directly about a specific dining establishment, visitors to Germany should care because outbreaks like this can impact local food supply chains, poultry availability, and restaurant menus, particularly affecting establishments that feature fresh chicken and egg-based dishes.
